titles.title: Not by Might, Not by Power (2)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's not by might, It's not by power But by My Spirit saith the Lord of Host It's not by might, It's not by power But by My Spirit saith the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This mountain shall be removed This mountain shall be removed This mountain shall be removed By my Spirit saith the Lord
